# Cove Blades

> Professional knife and cutlery sharpening service in the Lower Mainland, BC, Canada.

## About
Cove Blades provides mobile knife sharpening across the Lower Mainland and drop-off service at our North Vancouver shop. Based in North Vancouver, we serve homes, restaurants, and businesses across 17 cities within a 105 km service radius. Founded in 2020.

## Services
- Mobile knife sharpening (we come to you — available in all 15 service-area cities)
- 24/7 secure drop-off box at 4086 Brockton Crescent, North Vancouver (drop-off available only at this North Vancouver location)
- Restaurant scheduled sharpening (weekly or bi-weekly mobile rotations)
- Blade repair, tip restoration, chip removal, handle tightening, rust removal
- Sharpening training programs (one-inch grinder, two-inch grinder, business automation)
- On-site event sharpening for block parties, flea markets, community events

## Pricing
- Standard kitchen knife: $12
- Japanese knife (single bevel): $18
- Ceramic knife: $18
- Kitchen scissors: $12/pair
- Larger garden tools and outdoor blades: $15–$25
- 30-day edge guarantee on every sharpening

## Service Area (17 cities)

### North Shore
- North Vancouver — based here, fastest service, drop-off available
- West Vancouver — 10–15 min away

### Vancouver
- Vancouver — under 30 min, 4,000+ restaurants
- Richmond — 25–30 min, Asian food capital, Steveston fishing village

### Burnaby & New Westminster
- Burnaby — 20–25 min
- New Westminster — 25–35 min, Quay, Sapperton, Brewery District

### Tri-Cities
- Coquitlam — 25–30 min
- Port Moody — 22–28 min, Brewer's Row
- Port Coquitlam — 30–35 min

### South of Fraser
- Surrey — 35–50 min, all six town centres
- Delta — 35–50 min, North Delta + Ladner + Tsawwassen
- White Rock — 50–60 min, beachfront promenade
- Langley — 50–65 min, City + Township, wineries

### Fraser Valley
- Maple Ridge — 40–50 min, semi-rural, garden tools
- Pitt Meadows — 40–45 min, agricultural area
- Abbotsford — 70–80 min, Fraser Valley capital, agricultural focus, 8-knife minimum
- Chilliwack — 90–105 min, eastern edge of service, Sardis, Vedder, Cultus Lake, 10-knife minimum

## Mobile Sharpening Minimums
- North Shore, Vancouver, Burnaby, Tri-Cities, New Westminster, Richmond: 5 knives ($60)
- Surrey, Delta, White Rock, Langley, Maple Ridge, Pitt Meadows: 5 knives ($60)
- Abbotsford: 8 knives ($96)
- Chilliwack: 10 knives ($120)

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: Noon–7:00 PM
- Saturday: Noon–4:00 PM
- Drop Box (North Vancouver only): 24/7
